title: Naalam Mura
overview: Jayesh, an expatriate, is picked up by a bunch of crime-branch officers as soon as he lands at the airport. They take him to an isolated facility to interrogate him for a murder case that has not been solved for years now. Is Jayesh the culprit or are the cops trying to pin the murder on him?
